references.text: Earle, CJ. 1997 onwards. The gymnosperm database
Farjon, A. 2010. A handbook of the world’s conifers. Leiden: Brill.
Laubenfels, DJ de. 1978. The taxonomy of Philippine Coniferae and Taxaceae. Kalikasan, Philippine Journal of Biology 7 (2): 118-152.
Laubenfels, DJ de. 1988. Taxaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 10: 347-351

Liu J, RI Milne, M Möller, GF Zhu, LJ Ye, YH Luo, JB Yang, MC Wambulwa, CN Wang, DZ L & LM Gao. 2018. Integrating a comprehensive DNA barcode reference library with a global map of yews (Taxus L.) for forensic identification. Molecular Ecology Resources 18: 1115-1131

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Val Salares & Pieter B. Pelser, 12 January 2020

species.citation: Spjut , J. Bot. Res. Inst. Texas 1 (2007) 237 ; Liu et al., Mol. Ecol. Resources 18 (2018) 1118; Type: from Taiwan. = Taxus obscura Spjut , J. Bot. Res. Inst. Texas 1 (2007) 235; Type: De Laubenfels P668 (A, holo), Luzon: Mt Banahaw, 26-Aug-1978. ≠ Taxus wallichiana auct. non Zucc. ; Foxw., PJS 6 c (1911) Bot. 166; Merr., EPFP 1 (1922) 5. ≠ Taxus sumatrana auct. non (Miq.) de Laub. ; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 10 (1988) 349.
species.distribution: Philippines, Taiwan. LUZON: Benguet, Laguna, Mountain Province, Quezon, MINDANAO: Davao del Sur.
species.notes: Moist subtropical forests and tropical highland ridges and mossy forests in the canopyand locally dominant. 1400-2800m.
